title: In a first, a CAR-T cell therapy drives 3 autoimmune diseases into remission in a single patient
summary: A CAR-T cell therapy has successfully treated not one, not two, but three different autoimmune diseases at once in a patient, providing further proof of the modality’s promise in the disease area as a likely first approval fast approaches.
cgt_reason: CAR-T cell therapy treating autoimmune diseases.
